name: Partner Sync Review
description: Convert AJ updates into explicit context, pack/session implications, and safe handoff plans.

notes: Do not proceed with broad cross-pack changes without AJ review.
Record all affected pack/session IDs in partner logs.
Default commit mode is explicit AJ per-commit approval.
Standing commit authority is allowed only when the active worktree is not `main` and AJ has approved auto-commits for that exact worktree.
